message.content:
Find all code related to the announcement/create API endpoint and the upgrade announcement dialog in the collabspace project. I need:

1. The backend controller/service that handles `/api/v1/announcement/create` - find the RO (request object) to see what fields are required
2. The frontend dialog component for "升级公告配置" (upgrade announcement config) - it seems to be missing a "title" field

Search in both D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-server and D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-web

Be thorough - check for "announcement", "公告", "upgrade" related files.

content.text: Failed to authenticate. API Error: 403 {"error":"模型 claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 未授权使用"}
